name: Ping
desc: Sends a client-side timestamp for the server to echo back. The client calculates round-trip latency from the difference.
notes: Sent after receiving S00PacketServerInfo. The server echoes the exact same long value in S01PacketPong. The client computes latency as receiveTime - sentTime.

modules.name: ServerScanner
modules.purpose: Manipulate or delay ping response to fake latency.

modules.name: PingSpoof
modules.purpose: Manipulate or delay ping response to fake latency.
